tasks.title: SQL Injection on DVWA
tasks.description: Exploit SQLi on Damn Vulnerable Web App to extract database information.

tasks.title: XSS Cookie Stealing
tasks.description: Perform a Stored XSS attack to steal a simulated victim's session cookie.

tasks.title: File Upload to Web Shell
tasks.description: Bypass file upload restrictions and upload a PHP web shell on DVWA.

tasks.title: Directory Enumeration & IDOR
tasks.description: Use Gobuster to find hidden directories and exploit an IDOR vulnerability.
